name: Sam Manson December 27, 2025
description:
Sam is a slim, fair-skinned teenage Caucasian girl with light violet eyes, thick brows and chin-length, straight black hair with a small ponytail at the top back of her head, held by a green hair tie, along with "M" shaped bangs. She also sported deep-violet lipstick on her lips.

Despite her otherwise thin physique, some of her outfits emphasizes her figure, mainly her hips.

Sam's usual attire consists of a black choker around her neck, a black cropped tank top with a light violet oval printed on the center, thick black bracelets on both her wrists, purple tights under a black skirt with a green crosshatch-design, and large black biker boots with metal-like soles.

She has also been seen in a wide variety of outfits, ranging from a rocker rebel than a goth of black and purple ball gown to a pink princess dress with hearts, and even one of the orange Fenton Works jumpsuits. In Beauty Marked, she wore fake vampire fangs.
creator: Buraddo
